source.book: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析6》

segments.text: Welcome to the State Museum, situated in the centre of this truly multi-cultural metropolis which is home to more than 30 different nationalities.
segments.translation: 欢迎来到国立博物馆，它坐落在这座名副其实的多元文化大都市的中心，这里居住着来自30多个不同国家的人。

segments.text: The museum has a number of exciting displays and exhibitions.
segments.translation: 博物馆里有许多精彩的陈列和展览。

segments.text: And this audio guide is designed to help you fully enjoy your visit.
segments.translation: 这个语音导览就是为了帮助您尽情享受这次参观而设计的。

segments.text: There are 15 galleries in total, and this season sees the opening of three new exhibitions.
segments.translation: 博物馆共有15个展厅，本季度还将开幕三个新展。

segments.text: We suggest that you start your tour with these highlights of the season.
segments.translation: 我们建议您从这几个本季度的亮点展览开始您的参观。

segments.text: The Heritage Clothes Exhibition is located in Gallery 3 of the museum.
segments.translation: 传统服饰展位于博物馆的3号展厅。

segments.text: People who live in the area have spent two years preparing this exhibition, which brings together some of the fascinating garments, traditionally worn in their own communities.
segments.translation: 住在本地区的居民花了两年时间筹备这个展览，把他们各自社区里传统穿着的一些精美服饰汇集到了一起。

segments.text: They looked into the history of their communities' clothing traditions and the customs and rituals related to them.
segments.translation: 他们深入研究了本社区服饰传统的历史，以及与之相关的风俗和礼仪。

segments.text: Overall, there are 16 countries from five continents being represented.
segments.translation: 总的来说，本次展览呈现了来自五大洲16个国家的服饰。

segments.text: The photos that accompany each exhibit were taken by some of the city's college students who are studying design and show the clothes being modelled by the real people who wear them in the course of their everyday lives.
segments.translation: 每件展品旁配的照片，都是本市学设计的大学生拍摄的，照片展示的是这些服饰由真正在日常生活中穿着它们的人来当模特。

segments.text: Another remarkable highlight of the season is the exhibition known as 'Toys from the Past', which can be visited in Gallery 9.
segments.translation: 本季度另一个引人注目的亮点是名为“往日玩具”的展览，可以在9号展厅参观。

segments.text: This exhibition appealing to people of all ages is on tour throughout the country and will be here for ten weeks only.
segments.translation: 这个展览老少皆宜，目前正在全国巡展，在这里只展出十周。

segments.text: Items on display include dolls produced over a century ago with beautiful porcelain faces and, in some cases, real hair.
segments.translation: 展出的物品包括一百多年前制作的娃娃，它们有着精美的瓷制脸庞，有些甚至还带着真发。

segments.text: The whole collection covers antique toys such as wooden train sets from many different generations and offers plenty of fun to children and adults.
segments.translation: 整个藏品涵盖了不同年代的古董玩具，比如木制火车套装，能给大人小孩都带来很多乐趣。

segments.text: The gigantic board games laid out on the gallery floor are among the most popular activities in the exhibition and should not be missed.
segments.translation: 铺在展厅地板上的那些巨型棋盘游戏是本次展览中最受欢迎的活动之一，千万别错过。

segments.text: A special display of miniature toys brings this exhibition to an end.
segments.translation: 本次展览以一批微型玩具的特别陈列作为收尾。

segments.text: These small objects are on loan from countries all over the world, some of which measure no more than a few centimetres.
segments.translation: 这些小物件是从世界各国借来的，其中有些还不到几厘米大。

segments.text: There is a tiny car made from match sticks, a toy aeroplane with the pilot and passengers made out of seashells and some delicate mini houses no higher than 4 centimetres.
segments.translation: 有用火柴棒做的小汽车，有用贝壳做出飞行员和乘客的玩具飞机，还有一些不超过4厘米高的精致迷你房屋。

segments.text: The final highlight of the season is the Biscuit Gallery No.15.
segments.translation: 本季度最后一个亮点是15号饼干展厅。

segments.text: About two decades ago, this city was renowned for its biscuits, although today the factory no longer exists.
segments.translation: 大约二十年前，这座城市曾以饼干闻名，尽管如今那家工厂已经不复存在了。

segments.text: Did you know, for example, that before biscuits were wrapped in paper or cardboard boxes, biscuit tins were fashion items?
segments.translation: 举个例子，您知道吗，在饼干还没用纸或纸盒包装之前，饼干铁盒可是很时髦的物件。

segments.text: The factory manufactured round, square, triangular and hexagonal tins for a whole range of different occasions to celebrate national events, festivals, famous faces, etc.
segments.translation: 那家工厂制作过圆形、方形、三角形和六边形的铁盒，用于各种不同的场合，比如庆祝国家大事、节日、纪念名人等等。

segments.text: One fascinating exhibition displays people's favourite biscuits.
segments.translation: 有一个很有意思的展览展出了人们最喜爱的饼干。

segments.text: There are sweet biscuits and savoury ones, biscuits filled with jam and biscuits filled with currants, biscuits with coloured toppings from sugar icing to chocolate sprinkles.
segments.translation: 有甜饼干也有咸饼干，有夹果酱的、有夹葡萄干的，还有裹着各种彩色配料的，从糖霜到巧克力碎屑应有尽有。

segments.text: When the factory finally closed, it announced that people's favourite biscuit was not as you might expect a chocolate biscuit or one filled with jam and cream, but a plain savoury one which was eaten with cheese.
segments.translation: 工厂最终关门时曾公布，人们最喜欢的饼干并不是你以为的巧克力饼干或夹果酱奶油的饼干，而是一种就着奶酪吃的、口味清淡的咸饼干。

segments.text: When you get to the end of the exhibition, there is an entertaining hands-on activity to fill your own biscuit tin.
segments.translation: 走到展览末尾时，还有一个好玩的动手活动，让你亲手把自己的饼干盒装满。

segments.text: All the biscuits ever produced by the company are piled up on the table along with various tins.
segments.translation: 这家公司曾经生产过的所有饼干，连同各式各样的铁盒，都堆放在桌子上。

segments.text: These biscuit replicas are made out of thin pieces of wood, but the weight, colours and shapes highly resemble the original biscuits.
segments.translation: 这些仿真饼干是用薄薄的木片做的，但重量、颜色和形状都跟真饼干非常相似。

segments.text: Your job is to fill the tin with biscuits, and when the lid is taken off, the biscuits are neatly placed as if the job were performed by a machine.
segments.translation: 你的任务是把铁盒装满饼干，等把盖子拿开时，饼干要摆放得整整齐齐，就像是机器装的一样。

segments.text: It may not be as easy as it seems.
segments.translation: 这可能没看上去那么容易。

segments.text: If you would like to buy a memento of your visit, there is a museum gift shop which sells postcards, souvenirs and hand-made pottery next to the information desk on the ground floor.
segments.translation: 如果您想买点纪念品，一楼服务台旁边有一间博物馆礼品店，出售明信片、纪念品和手工陶器。

segments.text: And finally, if you don't want to carry your coats and bags around with you during your visit, please make use of the complimentary lockers provided by the museum.
segments.translation: 最后，如果您不想在参观时随身拎着外套和包，欢迎使用博物馆提供的免费储物柜。

segments.text: Enjoy your visit!
segments.translation: 祝您参观愉快！
